results.notes: Current data appears incorrect. Should be 19" base or 20" optional staggered setup.
Current sizes don't match OEM specs. SL450/SL550 use 255/35R19 front, 285/30R19 rear.
2003 SL500 used square 255/45R17 setup, not staggered.
New generation AMG SL (2022+) uses 265/40R20 front, 295/35R20 rear. Current sizes are outdated.

trims.name: SL500 (AMG Package)
trims.notes: No dedicated AMG SL model in 2001, only AMG packages

results.notes: 245/40R18 not OEM size. Should be 245/35R18 rear on 18" wheels.

keyFindings: S-Class Cabrio AMG (2016-2020): All 5 vehicles missing tire data - should be 255/40R20 front, 285/35R20 rear
S-Class Coupe AMG (2014-2021): All 8 vehicles missing tire data - should be 255/40R20 front, 285/35R20 rear
S-Class Coupe (2015-2021): 7 vehicles have incorrect tire sizes - current shows 255/45R18 but should be 245/45R19 or 245/40R20 staggered
SLC-Class AMG (2016-2020): All 5 vehicles missing tire data - should be 235/40R18 front, 255/35R18 rear
New gen AMG SL (2022-2026): Current data shows old sizes - should be 265/40R20 front, 295/35R20 rear
SL-Class 2000-2003: Currently showing staggered 18"/19"/20" but should be square 245/45R17 or 255/45R17
SLC-Class: Current 245/40R18 should be 245/35R18 on 18" wheels
